'''âsh-dh-dh''' ('''kashadhadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbatch|unbatch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-dh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbatch|unbatch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-dh-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kashadhadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishadhadh|thishadhadh]] || [[word:jishadhadh|jishadhadh]] || [[word:shishadhadh|shishadhadh]] || [[word:kishadhadh|kishadhadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushadhadh|thuthushadhadh]] || [[word:jujushadhadh|jujushadhadh]] || [[word:shushushadhadh|shushushadhadh]] || [[word:kukushadhadh|kukushadhadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushadhadh|thushadhadh]] || [[word:jushadhadh|jushadhadh]] || [[word:shushadhadh|shushadhadh]] || [[word:kushadhadh|kushadhadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushadhadh|thushadhadh]] || [[word:jushadhadh|jushadhadh]] || [[word:shushadhadh|shushadhadh]] || [[word:kushadhadh|kushadhadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshadhadh|theshadhadh]] || [[word:jeshadhadh|jeshadhadh]] || [[word:sheshadhadh|sheshadhadh]] || [[word:keshadhadh|keshadhadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshadhadh|thothoshadhadh]] || [[word:jojoshadhadh|jojoshadhadh]] || [[word:shoshoshadhadh|shoshoshadhadh]] || [[word:kokoshadhadh|kokoshadhadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshadhadh|thoshadhadh]] || [[word:joshadhadh|joshadhadh]] || [[word:shoshadhadh|shoshadhadh]] || [[word:koshadhadh|koshadhadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshadhadh|thoshadhadh]] || [[word:joshadhadh|joshadhadh]] || [[word:shoshadhadh|shoshadhadh]] || [[word:koshadhadh|koshadhadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshadhadh|thĂŠshadhadh]] || [[word:jĂŠshadhadh|jĂŠshadhadh]] || [[word:shĂŠshadhadh|shĂŠshadhadh]] || [[word:kĂŠshadhadh|kĂŠshadhadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashadhadh|thathashadhadh]] || [[word:jajashadhadh|jajashadhadh]] || [[word:shashashadhadh|shashashadhadh]] || [[word:kakashadhadh|kakashadhadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashadhadh|thashadhadh]] || [[word:jashadhadh|jashadhadh]] || [[word:shashadhadh|shashadhadh]] || [[word:kashadhadh|kashadhadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashadhadh|thashadhadh]] || [[word:jashadhadh|jashadhadh]] || [[word:shashadhadh|shashadhadh]] || [[word:kashadhadh|kashadhadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashadhadh|shashadhadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashadhadh|goshashadhadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashadhadh|gokishashadhadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashadhadhnĂŒ|shashadhadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashadhadhnknĂŒ|goshashadhadhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashadhadhnĂŒ|gokishashadhadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashadhadhshĂ«|shashadhadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashadhadhnkshĂ«|goshashadhadhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashadhadhshĂ«|gokishashadhadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashadhadhro|shashadhadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashadhadhnkro|goshashadhadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashadhadhro|gokishashadhadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashadhadhmu|shashadhadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashadhadhnkmu|goshashadhadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashadhadhmu|gokishashadhadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashadhadhsher|shashadhadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashadhadhnksher|goshashadhadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashadhadhsher|gokishashadhadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashadhadhng|shashadhadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashadhadhnkng|goshashadhadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashadhadhng|gokishashadhadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashadhadhya|shashadhadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashadhadhnkya|goshashadhadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashadhadhya|gokishashadhadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashadhadhyam|shashadhadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashadhadhnkyam|goshashadhadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashadhadhyam|gokishashadhadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashadhadhnĂŒshĂ«|shashadhadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashadhadhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashadhadhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashadhadhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashadhadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashadhadhnĂŒro|shashadhadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashadhadhnknĂŒro|goshashadhadhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashadhadhnĂŒro|gokishashadhadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashadhadhnĂŒmu|shashadhadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashadhadhnknĂŒmu|goshashadhadhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashadhadhnĂŒmu|gokishashadhadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashadhadhshĂ«nĂŒ|shashadhadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashadhadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashadhadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashadhadhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashadhadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashadhadhshĂ«ro|shashadhadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashadhadhnkshĂ«ro|goshashadhadhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashadhadhshĂ«ro|gokishashadhadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashadhadhshĂ«mu|shashadhadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashadhadhnkshĂ«mu|goshashadhadhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashadhadhshĂ«mu|gokishashadhadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashadhadhronĂŒ|shashadhadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashadhadhnkronĂŒ|goshashadhadhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashadhadhronĂŒ|gokishashadhadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashadhadhroshĂ«|shashadhadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashadhadhnkroshĂ«|goshashadhadhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashadhadhroshĂ«|gokishashadhadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashadhadhromu|shashadhadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashadhadhnkromu|goshashadhadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashadhadhromu|gokishashadhadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashadhadhmunĂŒ|shashadhadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashadhadhnkmunĂŒ|goshashadhadhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashadhadhmunĂŒ|gokishashadhadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashadhadhmushĂ«|shashadhadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashadhadhnkmushĂ«|goshashadhadhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashadhadhmushĂ«|gokishashadhadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashadhadhmuro|shashadhadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashadhadhnkmuro|goshashadhadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashadhadhmuro|gokishashadhadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
